pi_items.source: Calculated via Python: 00:01:30:12 at 24 fps = 90.5 seconds. Multiplying by 44100 Hz (the explicit fallback sample rate in setup_task.sh) equals exactly 3991050.
Explicitly used in verifier.py logic (equivalent to 1 second of audio at 44100 Hz)
Matches task description and setup_task.sh exactly
Matches variables in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring an Ardour session's timecode to exactly 24 fps and aligning an audio clip to SMPTE 00:01:30:12. This timecode resolves to exactly 90.5 seconds. By utilizing a 44100 Hz sample rate (explicitly enforced by the setup script's fallback audio generation via `sox -r 44100`), the 90.5 seconds mathematically equates to exactly 3991050 samples. The verifier uses this 3991050 exact target value alongside tolerance boundaries to evaluate the region's position within the saved session XML.
